# clearpass_local_users (Data Source)

Retrieves a comprehensive list of all Local Users available in ClearPass.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve all local users from ClearPass
data "clearpass_local_users" "all" {}

# Output the list of all local users
output "all_local_users" {
  value = data.clearpass_local_users.all.items
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier to satisfy Terraform framework requirements.
- `items` (Block List) A list containing the local users and their basic summary information. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--items))

<a id="nestedblock--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `attributes` (Map of String) Additional attributes (key/value pairs) stored with the local user account.
- `change_pwd_next_login` (Boolean) Flag indicating if the password change is required in next login.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the user account is enabled.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the local user.
- `password_hash` (String) The password hash of the local user.
- `password_ntlm_hash` (String) The NTLM password hash of the local user.
- `role_name` (String) The name of the role assigned to the user. This determines the user's permissions.
- `user_id` (String) The unique identifier for the user.
- `username` (String) The username used for authentication.
